title: Week 09 - Search and Binary Search
description: Practice linear search and position reporting.

questions.title: Search for a Student Number

description.statement: Return the first 1-based position of target in the array, or 0 if it is missing.
description.input: An array table and a target number.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(numbers, target)
    for i = 1, #numbers do
        if numbers[i] == target then
            return i
        end
    end
    return 0
end
